--- Main Page ---
CONFECTIONS – Bakery & Cafe – Sweetening Your Moments in Duluth, Lawrenceville, Suwanee, and Johns Creek, Georgia!
Skip to main content
Press enter to begin your search
Close Search
Creating Sweet Memories,
One “
Confections”
at a Time.
Our bakery is driven by the desire to create delightful experiences for our customers, whether it's through the artistry of our pastries, the nostalgia of our classic desserts, or the innovation in our new confections. We believe that every bite should be a source of comfort, celebration, or connection.
We Make Amazing Things Every Day.
New
Order Cake
Indulge in our exquisite cakes by placing your order today!
ORDER NOW
Signature Bread
Savor the unique flavors of our signature breads, crafted with passion and perfection.
Our Special
Quench your thirst with our special selection of artisanal drinks, carefully crafted to complement our delightful baked treats.
Our Breads
we honor the centuries-old tradition of artisanal bread-making. Each loaf is meticulously crafted by our skilled bakers, using only the finest ingredients and time-honored techniques passed down through generations.
Our Drinks
From rich espresso creations to refreshing iced teas, every sip is a symphony of flavors designed to delight your senses.
Gift Sweet Memories with Our Treats!
Quench your thirst for sweetness and order our delectable drinks online now!
